**TEMPO frontier-orbital result** — Computed with chemkit `frontier-orbitals` using DFT tier `standard`, explicitly `b3lyp/def2-tzvp`, in PySCF; gas phase (`solvent: null`), charge 0, multiplicity 2. Geometry: fixed user-supplied XYZ at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz` (29 atoms); this was a frontier-orbital single-point calculation, not a geometry optimization. Density fitting was not requested. SCF converged in 12 cycles.

Headline HOMO–LUMO gap: **3.8724203 eV**.
HOMO: -6.3375439 eV; LUMO: -2.4651235 eV. Total electronic energy: -483.88366 Hartree (-13167.145 eV). Koopmans-style vertical IP: 6.3375439 eV; vertical EA: 2.4651235 eV.

Warnings: no warnings reported in the tool result.
Engine integrity verdict: `trustworthy: true`.
Provenance: computed.

Command recorded by chemkit: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 2 --accept-defaults --stdout json --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpcmnjxini/live.json`.
